name: Stuffed Bell Peppers
recipeInstructions:
1. Preheat oven to 350°F.
2. Season the ground beef with salt, pepper, and paprika.
3. In a large skillet, heat olive oil over medium heat. Add onion, chopped bell pepper, and minced garlic. Sauté for about 5 minutes until softened.
4. Add the seasoned ground beef to the skillet and cook until browned, breaking up any clumps.
5. Crumble in the bouillon cube and stir to combine with the meat mixture.
6. Stir in salt, pepper, and paprika to taste.
7. Mix in corn kernels and cooked white rice.
8. Carefully stuff each bell pepper with the beef mixture.
9. Place stuffed peppers in a baking dish and bake for 30 minutes at 350°F until tender.
Alternatives:
- Cut the bell peppers into rings and place them in a covered casserole dish with the meat mixture. Add more bell pepper slices on top if desired, and cover with cheese.
- Prepare a sauce by dicing tomatoes and adding diced onions and bell pepper to taste. Pour this sauce over the stuffed peppers and bake until tender.
